personal.name: Shashi Kumar Singh
personal.title: Senior DevOps & Platform Engineer
personal.tagline: Designing scalable cloud infrastructure, DevOps automation platforms and Kubernetes ecosystems.

summary: Senior DevOps Engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable cloud infrastructure, CI/CD automation, Kubernetes platforms and high availability distributed systems. Specialized in AWS cloud architecture, infrastructure as code using Terraform, container orchestration with Kubernetes, observability platforms and automation using Python and Bash scripting. Proven experience improving deployment reliability, reducing operational overhead and enabling developer productivity through DevOps platform engineering.

responsibilities: Designed scalable Kubernetes infrastructure supporting microservices platforms.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions improving deployment efficiency.
Built infrastructure automation frameworks using Terraform.
Implemented centralized observability platform using Prometheus and Grafana.
Reduced deployment failures and improved platform reliability.
Migrated financial systems infrastructure to AWS cloud platform.
Automated deployment pipelines for enterprise applications.
Implemented monitoring and logging solutions across production systems.
Developed infrastructure automation scripts using Python and Bash.
Maintained Linux infrastructure for production workloads.
Implemented monitoring systems to improve operational visibility.
Worked with AWS cloud infrastructure including EC2, VPC and S3.
Built small automation scripts for infrastructure provisioning.
Learned DevOps practices and cloud architecture fundamentals.
